column2: The Hegemony Decisions are now available! Happy hunting.....

These decisions grant an exclusive, permanent technology unlock for owning an entire region as a great power.\n§RNo one else can claim the same hegemony after it has been claimed.\nAll other Great Powers will lose infamy, get increased CB generation speed, and a small mobilization bonus when you declare a hegemony!

$FROMCOUNTRY$ has grown bold enough to declare that they and they alone control a significant chunk of the world and that no-one can stop them from not only believing so but actually practicing such a belief. Citizens across our nation, across every race, background, and class have taken it as a personal slight and have unified, at least for now.
§RPerhaps we should put $FROMCOUNTRY$ in their place.....
Our nation is reeling from the news of a recent hegemony....
Time to cash in on our long-term investment!
Time to integrate the Afghani tribes into our colonial government!
I am impatient and want to scale without worrying about some bums inting me!
So you conquered the nation cause it made you feel insecure? Cause it called you gay?
Here's a crumpled $20 bill from my back pocket to make it better
Use this if you have no Goku or Frieza and aren't getting the event.\nIf you use this to spam the general event, the host will give you sanctions/max infamy
